---
id: create-a-project
title: "Create a project"
description: "Requires `project:create` permission. The creator is automatically added as a `manager` project member."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a project"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/admin/projects"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires `project:create` permission. The creator is automatically added as a `manager` project member.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
